meaning: n.(俄国的)三驾马车,紧密联系的三人
examples: Sberbank is negotiating to buy Troika Dialog, a local asset manager and investment bank.
Fortunately Greece can fund itself for two more years on cheap borrowing from the troika before it faces restructuring that debt.
Kingsmill Bond at Moscow's Troika Dialog suggests the Baltic company Trigon Agri as a way to play the catch-up story in the Eurasian steppe.
Their angry chants were directed at the troika, the EU and in particular Germany's Angela Merkel.
The troika is made up of the European Commission, European Central Bank and International Monetary Fund.
